title: template_config
description: Schema for a template's `template.json` (v011 K5). v1 templates declare format version, spec_root location, optional doctor extensibility hooks, and optional LLM-prompt paths. v2 additionally requires `spec_files` — a manifest mapping every materialized spec-target file to a per-file `kind` (markdown) that governs heading-coverage applicability and LLM-context inclusion.

template_format_version.description: Template format version. v1 is markdown-only (implicit manifest synthesized from the seed prompt's well-known file set). v2 declares the `spec_files` manifest explicitly (every entry of kind `markdown`).

spec_root.description: Directory under the repo root containing the spec files, proposed_changes/, and history/. Templates that place spec files directly at the repo root set './'.

spec_files.description: v2-only manifest. Maps spec-target-relative path strings to per-file declarations. Per `contracts.md` §"Template manifest wire contract", each value carries `{kind: markdown}`. livespec governs only markdown spec files; an alternate tool's diagram image is just an opaque committed asset, not a manifest-declared file kind.

kind.description: Per-file kind discriminator. `markdown` files are subject to heading-coverage and LLM-context inclusion.

doctor_static_check_modules.description: Paths relative to the template root naming Python modules that contribute additional doctor-static checks via TEMPLATE_CHECKS export.

doctor_llm_objective_checks_prompt.description: Path relative to the template root naming a Markdown prompt for the LLM-driven objective-checks phase. null disables this template's contribution.

doctor_llm_subjective_checks_prompt.description: Path relative to the template root naming a Markdown prompt for the LLM-driven subjective-checks phase. null disables this template's contribution.
